# Vocals (usevocals.com)

> Vocals is an AI voice-agent platform by Usevocals LLC that handles inbound and outbound business calls with real conversations — no scripts. It dials at scale, qualifies leads in real time and pushes them to your CRM automatically.

## Key facts
- Real-time voice pipeline with under 2 seconds of latency per turn
- 500,000+ completed customer calls; >50% conversion rate; full integration in under 14 days
- Mass dialing: up to 500 calls every 10 minutes
- Bring-your-own API keys (OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, ElevenLabs, Deepgram, Twilio) — no per-minute markup, full data control
- Languages: English and Spanish (native)
- Customer case: EVO Beauty Clinics (Spain) — +25% conversion, 400+ appointments booked, response to every lead in under 5 minutes

## Use-case sectors
Clinics & dentists, restaurants, elevators & maintenance, real estate, auto shops, schools, vending operators, property managers, suppliers & wholesalers.
